minimal_context: The student is filling in personal information on a CAT6 standardized test answer sheet in a classroom setting.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please start filling in your personal information on the CAT6 standardized test answer sheets.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sitting calmly and attentively) I am filling out the first section.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Next, I will tell you which of you are counted as English learners.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Gaby, please fill in the bubble that indicates that Spanish is the language most used in your home.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I was born in this country, boy!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please start filling in your personal information on the CAT6 standardized test answer sheets.

STUDENT: (Sitting calmly and attentively) I am filling out the first section.

TUTOR: Next, I will tell you which of you are counted as English learners.

STUDENT: (Waits attentively for the next instruction)

TUTOR: Gaby, please fill in the bubble that indicates that Spanish is the language most used in your home.

STUDENT: I was born in this country, boy!
